rulings.Case Title: GREG MORRIS VS. SAFECO INSURANCE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 7, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT CRAWFORD AND COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT: THE FOURTH AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOT BEFORE THE COURT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF MUST SEEK LEAVE OF COURT TO FILE IT. DEMURRER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FIVE, ELEVEN, TWELVE AND SEVENTEEN. CRAWFORD IS NOT A STATE ACTOR UNDER 42 USC SECTION 1983; THE FACTS ALLEGED DO NOT SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR OBSTRUCTION OF JUSTICE; PLAINTIFF HAS NOT OPPOSED THE DEMURRER TO THE TWELFTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND CONCEDES THE SEVENTEENTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS DEFECTIVE. THE FOLLOWING ARE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN THIRTY DAYS: CAUSES OF ACTION FOUR AND NINE TO ALLEGE EXPRESS MISREPRESENTATION TO PLAINTIFF BY CRAWFORD; CAUSE OF ACTION FIFTEEN TO ALLEGE HOW CRAWFORD'S ACTS PROXIMATELY CAUSED DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S PERSON OR PROPERTY. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: ARKADY GORELIK et al VS. MIKHAIL GORELIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Motion Of Mikhail Gorelik For Leave To File Cross-Complaint And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Coplaint;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JUNE 7, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL GORELIK'S Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint IS GRANTED FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR PARTITION. DENY MOTION TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR INVASION OF PRIVACY, AND INTENTIONAL AND NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. THESE ARE NOT COMPULSORY CLAIMS AND ALLOWING THE AMENDMENT WOULD ONLY COMPLICATE THE REAL PROPERTY DISPUTE. =(302/PJM/AP)
